title: Training pipelines & experiment tracking
focus: Airflow vs Kubeflow vs Prefect; MLflow / W&B; reproducibility traps.

items.label: Pipeline orchestrators: Airflow, Prefect, Kubeflow, Metaflow
interviewQuestions: Compare Airflow vs Prefect vs Kubeflow for ML pipelines.
When does an ML team outgrow Airflow?

items.label: Experiment tracking: MLflow, W&B, Comet
interviewQuestions: What metadata do you log for every training run?
How would you reconstruct a 6-month-old training run from your tracking metadata?

items.label: Reproducibility: seeds, environments, lockfiles
interviewQuestions: Why does setting a seed not guarantee reproducibility on GPUs?
What three artifacts MUST you pin to make an ML training run actually reproducible?

items.label: Pipeline RTO/RPO, retries, idempotency, and recovery checkpoints
interviewQuestions: What are RTO and RPO for a training pipeline, and how do they differ from an online serving SLO?
How do you make feature generation and model training idempotent after a partial failure?
When should a failed retraining job page someone vs retry silently?

items.label: Lineage and auditability across data, code, model, prompt, and deployment artifacts
interviewQuestions: How would you answer: which exact data, code, features, and hyperparameters produced this prediction?
What lineage metadata is necessary for compliance vs useful for debugging?
How do model cards stay accurate after automated retraining?
